parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT hs.user_id FROM positioning.health_scores hs WHERE hs.score_month >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months');

SELECT hs.score_month, hs.total_score, hs.buyer_alignment_score, hs.differentiation_score, hs.narrative_fit_score, hs.dimensions_available, hs.breakdown, hs.trend_vs_prior FROM positioning.health_scores hs WHERE hs.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY hs.score_month DESC LIMIT 3;

SELECT de.page_url, de.page_type, de.change_description, de.severity, de.drift_direction, de.detected_at, de.resolved FROM positioning.drift_events de WHERE de.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND de.detected_at >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months') ORDER BY de.detected_at DESC;

INSERT INTO positioning.audits (user_id, quarter, title, content_json, content_md, claim_count, recommendations) VALUES ('{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.quarter }}', '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.content_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.content_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.claim_count }}, '{{ $json.recommendations }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (user_id, quarter) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, content_json = EXCLUDED.content_json, content_md = EXCLUDED.content_md, claim_count = EXCLUDED.claim_count, recommendations = EXCLUDED.recommendations;
